title: AN ACT MAKING THE REGISTER OF DEEDS OF THE PROVINCE OF ILOILOEX-OFFICIOREGISTER OF DEEDS FOR THE CITY OF ILOILO, BY AMENDING THE CHARTER OF THE CITY OF ILOILO.

chunks.text:
H. No. 4644 / 58 OG No. 20, 4018 (May 14, 1962)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 3333, June 18, 1961 ]

AN ACT MAKING THE REGISTER OF DEEDS OF THE PROVINCE OF ILOILO

EX-OFFICIO

REGISTER OF DEEDS FOR THE CITY OF ILOILO, BY AMENDING THE CHARTER OF THE CITY OF ILOILO.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. There is hereby inserted after Section eighty-one, Article X of Commonwealth Act Numbered One hundred and fifty-eight, otherwise known as the Charter of the City of Iloilo, a new section which shall read as follows:

"SEC. 81-A.

Register of Deeds.

&mdashThe Register of Deeds of the Province of Iloilo shall be

ex-officio

Register of Deeds of the City of Iloilo and as such shall receive an additional compensation, to be paid out of the city funds, in the sum of one thousand two hundred pesos

per annum.

"

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted, without Executive approval, June 18, 1961.
